metadata.notes: agent=yes daemon=full driver=ready — the model name is harvested from the <USER_SETTINGS_CHANGE> block in the transcript and attached to assistant events, so ModelName is observable; the interactive driver still stubs wait_turn (DRIVE_ELICITS='send slash sleep'), so record must port the turn-done poll first (route driver-gap).

assessment.body:
## Verdict

**agent=yes** — `agy` runs under a selected model (Gemini 3 Flash by default; Claude 4.5/opus/sonnet/haiku also offered). The selection is recorded in the transcript as a `<USER_SETTINGS_CHANGE>` block (`changed setting \`Model Selection\` from None to Gemini 3.5 Flash (Medium).`), confirmed present in 3 of 4 sample transcripts on this machine.

**daemon=full** — The parser harvests the model name from that block via `userSettingsModelRe`, normalizes it, and attaches it to every subsequent assistant event (`ev.ModelName = p.model`). So after one turn `SessionMetrics.ModelName` is the running model string (not 'unknown'), and ContextWindow falls out of the capacity table for the resolved model. This is the basic-turn state arc plus a populated ModelName — fully observable from the tailed JSONL. (PROVISIONAL on emission only: the model line is harvested on the FIRST switch; if a session boots on the account default with no settings-change line in the transcript, ModelName would stay empty until a switch — record confirms whether the boot model writes a settings-change line.)

**driver=ready** — The recipe needs `wait_turn` to gate the assertion after turn completion, but the antigravity interactive driver stubs it (`wait_turn(){ not_implemented wait_turn }`; `DRIVE_ELICITS="send slash sleep"`). Also SEAM 1/SEAM 3 (resolve live session_id + transcript path) are unported. record ports the turn-done poll from a reference driver (claudecode polls transcript stop, gemini-cli polls for turn_done) before driving.

Observations: `model` left provisional (do not hard-pin a doc-guessed id) — record fills it from the recording; `agent=antigravity`. Tokens/cost are SQLite-only so the cost/token observations are NOT asserted for this cell.
caveats: Model name is harvested ONLY from <USER_SETTINGS_CHANGE>; if the boot model emits no such line, ModelName stays empty until a switch — record must confirm the boot model writes one.
ContextWindow depends on the capacity table having the resolved antigravity/Gemini model id.
cost/tokens observations omitted: usage is SQLite-protobuf only (no MetricsReader).

sources.note: userSettingsModelRe harvests model from <USER_SETTINGS_CHANGE>; ev.ModelName attached to assistant events
TestModelExtraction / TestRawModelCapture lock the regex against 'Gemini 3.5 Flash' and 'Claude Opus 4.1'
wait_turn stubbed (not_implemented); DRIVE_ELICITS='send slash sleep'; SEAM 1/3 unported → driver gap

script.text: Reply with exactly the word: ok
